contract: magnetek_impulse_g_plus_mini Run A vs Run B comparison

manual.title: Magnetek IMPULSE G+ Mini Technical Manual

run_a.note: Grade covers schema+domain layers only, on an EMPTY pack — not a quality signal. Graded with PR #2690's grading/domain_rules.py (crane domain), which is NOT on main.

run_b.note: Gold-set categories remain N/A (no gold set) — grade covers schema/cite/domain/provenance layers; promotion verdict NOT PROMOTABLE (INCOMPLETE), unchanged policy from Run A. No thresholds altered.
run_b.revision: rev2 (post-adversarial-verification: 10 rows restored — dash page-refs + p.173 legend-bridge fix; 2 grouped-range rows deliberately skipped, logged)
known_limitations: grouped-range parameter rows (F07.23-to-F07.32, F07.33-to-F07.42) skipped — one row defines 10 instances, per-id attribution impossible; loud log + documented (same posture as the PowerFlex comma-group skip)

comparability_caveats: Run A was graded on the #2690 branch which adds crane-domain grading rules absent from main; if Run B grades on main's rules, grade deltas are not apples-to-apples — extraction COUNTS and citation coverage are the primary Run B success metric.
Run A extraction used the same manual bytes (sha256 above); extraction-count delta is therefore attributable to extractor changes alone.

success_criteria.primary: fault_codes and parameters materially > 0 with page citations, source-preserved mnemonic identifiers, no fabricated rows
must_not: regress GS10 / PF40 / PF525 / GS20 extraction or grading
invent integer keys for mnemonic faults
promote anything to runtime or gold/

delta.parameters: +468 (0 -> 468, dotted ids verbatim; +2 grouped rows deliberately skipped, logged)
delta.schema_direction_evidence: runtime dict[int,str] fault_codes CANNOT hold this family; candidate-layer fault_entries[] (string fault_id) loads through the real runtime loader untouched — supports a string-identifier fault schema in Run C.

adversarial_verification.round_1: REJECT — 12 parameters present in manual but not extracted (0 invented faults, 0 glyph errors, 0 column shifts, citations verbatim on all samples)
adversarial_verification.fix: 10 restored (dash page-refs accepted; p.173 legend-bridge geometry fixed); 2 grouped-range rows deliberately skipped + logged (per-id attribution impossible)
adversarial_verification.round_2: ACCEPT — all 10 restorations verified against the manual text layer; 5-entry regression spot-check intact; verifier's 470 census reconciled (overstated by grouped-row endpoints); 'extraction rev2 is complete for all extractable parameters'
